vLLM releases: v0.24.0
items.description:
# vLLM v0.24.0 Release Notes

## Highlights

This release features 571 commits from 256 contributors (77 new)!

* **MiniMax-M3**: Added support for the new **MiniMax-M3** model (#45381), with a fast follow-on of BF16/FP8 indexer via MSA (#45892), MXFP4 support (#45896), FP8 sparse GQA (#45744)
